p3-10.sentence: 妈妈每天都在厨房里做饭。(Mom cooks in the kitchen every day.)

words: 脏乱 (zāng luàn, dirty and messy)
又脏又臭 (yòu zāng yòu chòu, dirty and smelly)
p3-10.definition-english: Dirty; unclean; not tidy
p3-10.sentence: 他把衣服弄脏了,需要重新洗一次。(He got his clothes dirty and needs to wash them again.)

p3-10.definition-english: A cupboard or cabinet for storing things
p3-10.sentence: 妹妹把玩具收进了衣橱里。(My little sister put her toys away in the wardrobe.)

words: 仔细检查 (zǐ xì jiǎn chá, examine carefully)
仔细观察 (zǐ xì guān chá, observe carefully)
p3-10.definition-english: Careful; attentive; detailed
p3-10.sentence: 老师提醒我们做事要仔细一点。(The teacher reminded us to be a bit more careful when doing things.)

p3-10.definition-english: To beckon; to wave; to recruit or attract
p3-10.sentence: 看到朋友,我立刻招手打招呼。(When I saw my friend, I immediately waved to greet him.)

words: 下定决心 (xià dìng jué xīn, make up one's mind)
p3-10.definition-english: To decide; to determine; to resolve
p3-10.sentence: 我们决定一起去清理公园里的垃圾。(We decided to go clean up the rubbish in the park together.)

words: 惊叫 (jīng jiào, cry out in fright)
大吃一惊 (dà chī yī jīng, greatly startled)
p3-10.definition-english: To startle; to frighten; to be surprised
p3-10.sentence: 突然跳出来的青蛙让她大吃一惊。(The frog that suddenly jumped out gave her a big fright.)

p3-10.definition-english: To shrink; to contract; to pull back
p3-10.sentence: 小猫受惊后缩成了一团。(The kitten curled up into a ball after being startled.)

words: 扔垃圾 (rēng lā jī, throw rubbish)
乱扔垃圾 (luàn rēng lā jī, litter rubbish carelessly)
p3-10.definition-english: To throw; to toss; to discard
p3-10.sentence: 请不要把垃圾乱扔在地上。(Please do not throw rubbish carelessly on the ground.)

words: 保持卫生 (bǎo chí wèi shēng, maintain hygiene)
保护环境 (bǎo hù huán jìng, protect the environment)
p3-10.definition-english: To protect; to keep; to guarantee
p3-10.sentence: 大家应该一起保护环境。(Everyone should work together to protect the environment.)

words: 保持卫生 (bǎo chí wèi shēng, maintain hygiene)
p3-10.definition-english: To hold; to maintain; to sustain
p3-10.sentence: 我们要保持环境的整洁。(We must keep the environment clean and tidy.)

words: 保持卫生 (bǎo chí wèi shēng, maintain hygiene)
p3-10.definition-english: To guard; to protect; hygiene, defense
p3-10.sentence: 保持个人卫生可以减少生病的机会。(Keeping personal hygiene can reduce the chance of falling sick.)

words: 爱护 (ài hù, cherish/take care of)
保护环境 (bǎo hù huán jìng, protect the environment)
p3-10.definition-english: To protect; to guard; to shield
p3-10.sentence: 我们要爱护校园里的花草树木。(We should take care of the flowers, plants and trees in our school.)

words: 周末的时候 (zhōu mò de shí hou, during the weekend)
p3-10.definition-english: A week; all around; surrounding
p3-10.sentence: 他环顾四周,发现地上有很多垃圾。(He looked around and found a lot of rubbish on the ground.)

words: 期末 (qī mò, end of term)
周末的时候 (zhōu mò de shí hou, during the weekend)
p3-10.definition-english: The end; the tip; the last part
p3-10.sentence: 周末我们一家人去公园野餐。(Over the weekend, our family went for a picnic in the park.)

words: 快点啊 (kuài diǎn a, hurry up!)
真漂亮啊 (zhēn piào liang a, how beautiful!)
p3-10.definition-english: A sentence-final particle used to express exclamation, surprise or emphasis
p3-10.definition-chinese: 语气词,表示惊讶或加强语气
p3-10.sentence: 地上怎么这么多垃圾啊。(Why is there so much rubbish on the ground!)

words: 转身离开 (zhuǎn shēn lí kāi, turn around and leave)
p3-10.definition-english: To turn; to rotate; to change direction
p3-10.sentence: 他转身一看,发现乌鸦在垃圾桶旁边。(He turned around and saw a crow next to the rubbish bin.)

words: 怎么办 (zěn me bàn, what to do)
怎么回事 (zěn me huí shì, what's going on?)
p3-10.definition-english: How; why (used mainly in 怎么)
p3-10.sentence: 地上的垃圾到底是怎么来的?(Where on earth did the rubbish on the ground come from?)

words: 追上 (zhuī shàng, catch up with)
能追得上 (néng zhuī de shàng, able to catch up with)
p3-10.definition-english: To chase; to pursue; to run after
p3-10.sentence: 他大声追问是谁乱扔垃圾。(He loudly questioned who had littered carelessly.)

words: 塑料袋 (sù liào dài, plastic bag)
p3-11.definition-english: A bag or sack used to hold or carry things.
p3-11.sentence: 妈妈出门买菜,记得带上环保袋。(Mom remembers to bring a reusable bag when she goes out to buy groceries.)

p3-11.definition-english: To take the place of something; a period of time or generation.
p3-11.sentence: 我们要用环保袋代替塑料袋。(We should use reusable bags to replace plastic bags.)

p3-11.english: to replace, substitute, on behalf of
words: 替代品 (tì dài pǐn, substitute item)
p3-11.definition-english: To take the place of someone or something.
p3-11.sentence: 布袋可以替代塑料袋。(Cloth bags can replace plastic bags.)

words: 塑料袋 (sù liào dài, plastic bag)
塑造 (sù zào, to mold, to shape)
p3-11.definition-english: A synthetic material, plastic; to mold or shape.
p3-11.sentence: 塑料袋对环境有害。(Plastic bags are harmful to the environment.)

p3-11.english: to brake, to stop a vehicle
words: 急刹车 (jí shā chē, to brake suddenly)
刹车片 (shā chē piàn, brake pad)
p3-11.definition-english: To apply the brakes to stop a moving vehicle.
p3-11.sentence: 骑脚踏车时,要记得用刹车减速。(When riding a bicycle, remember to use the brakes to slow down.)

p3-11.definition-english: To use something, or to cause something to happen.
p3-11.sentence: 我们应该少使用塑料制品。(We should use fewer plastic products.)

words: 废物利用 (fèi wù lì yòng, to reuse waste)
p3-11.definition-english: Something discarded or no longer useful; to waste.
p3-11.sentence: 旧报纸也可以废物利用。(Old newspapers can also be reused and recycled.)

p3-11.definition-english: A container, usually made of glass or plastic, for holding liquids.
p3-11.sentence: 喝完水后,请把瓶子放进回收桶。(After drinking the water, please put the bottle into the recycling bin.)

words: 并不 (bìng bù, not at all)
p3-11.definition-english: Used to join two related actions or ideas; to combine or merge.
p3-11.sentence: 我们要环保,并且节省用水。(We should protect the environment, and also save water.)

words: 太平洋 (tài píng yáng, Pacific Ocean)
p3-11.definition-english: The vast ocean; a large body of sea water.
p3-11.sentence: 垃圾污染了海洋,伤害了海洋生物。(Rubbish pollutes the ocean and harms marine life.)

words: 用品 (yòng pǐn, daily items, supplies)
p3-11.definition-english: An item or product; goods made or sold.
p3-11.sentence: 购买日常用品时,要选择环保的产品。(When buying daily necessities, choose environmentally friendly products.)

words: 负责 (fù zé, to be responsible)
p3-11.definition-english: A duty or obligation one must fulfil; to blame.
p3-11.sentence: 保护环境是每个人的责任。(Protecting the environment is everyone's responsibility.)

p3-11.english: duty, task, to allow, to appoint
p3-11.definition-english: A duty, task, or responsibility given to someone.
p3-11.sentence: 老师给我们一个任务,要减少浪费。(The teacher gave us a task to reduce waste.)

p3-11.english: if, such as, to be like
p3-11.definition-english: Used to mean 'if' when introducing a condition, or 'like/such as' when giving an example.
p3-11.sentence: 如果每个人都节约用水,环境就会更好。(If everyone saves water, the environment will be better.)

p3-11.english: utmost, to exhaust, to the greatest extent
words: 尽力 (jìn lì, to try one's best)
尽一份力 (jìn yí fèn lì, to do one's part)
尽量 (jǐn liàng, as much as possible)
p3-11.definition-english: To use up all of one's effort; to do one's utmost.
p3-11.sentence: 为了保护环境,大家要尽一份力。(To protect the environment, everyone should do their part.)

words: 一份 (yí fèn, a portion, a copy)
尽一份力 (jìn yí fèn lì, to do one's part)
p3-11.definition-english: A portion, share, or copy of something.
p3-11.sentence: 每个人都应该尽一份力,爱护环境。(Everyone should do their part to take care of the environment.)

words: 循环 (xún huán, to recycle, cycle)
p3-11.definition-english: Relating to the environment; a ring or loop shape.
p3-11.sentence: 环保从我做起。(Environmental protection starts with me.)

p3-11.english: to pack, to install, to pretend, clothing
p3-11.definition-english: To pack or wrap something, or to install; packaging.
p3-11.sentence: 买东西时,过多的包装会造成浪费。(When shopping, excessive packaging causes waste.)

words: 回报 (huí bào, to repay, to return)
举报 (jǔ bào, to report an offence)
p3-11.definition-english: To announce or report information; a newspaper.
p3-11.sentence: 看完的旧报纸,可以拿去回收。(Old newspapers that have been read can be taken for recycling.)

words: 组织 (zǔ zhī, to organize, organization)
组成 (zǔ chéng, to form, to compose)
p3-11.definition-english: A group of people or things; to organize or form.
p3-11.sentence: 老师把我们分成几个小组,一起做环保海报。(The teacher divided us into several small groups to make environmental posters together.)

p3-11.definition-english: A house or room where people live.
p3-11.sentence: 我们要保持屋子干净,减少垃圾。(We should keep our house clean and reduce rubbish.)

words: 场所 (chǎng suǒ, a place, venue)
p3-11.definition-english: A place or venue where an activity takes place.
p3-11.sentence: 学校设立了一个回收场所,方便大家丢旧物。(The school set up a recycling place, making it convenient for everyone to dispose of old items.)

words: 一辆车 (yí liàng chē, one vehicle)
两辆自行车 (liǎng liàng zì xíng chē, two bicycles)
p3-11.definition-english: A measure word used for counting vehicles.
p3-11.definition-chinese: 一辆车；车辆；两辆自行车
p3-11.sentence: 校门口停了好几辆脚踏车。(Several bicycles are parked at the school gate.)

words: 流浪 (liú làng, to wander, homeless)
p3-11.definition-english: A wave in water; to waste something needlessly.
p3-11.sentence: 我们不应该浪费食物。(We should not waste food.)

words: 免费 (miǎn fèi, free of charge)
p3-11.definition-english: A fee or cost; to spend or use up resources wastefully.
p3-11.sentence: 随手关灯可以节省电费,减少浪费。(Turning off lights when not needed can save electricity costs and reduce waste.)

p3-11.definition-english: Used to mean 'therefore'; also refers to a place.
p3-11.sentence: 因为塑料袋会污染环境,所以我们要少用。(Because plastic bags pollute the environment, we should use them less.)

p3-11.english: to recognize, to think/believe, to admit
words: 认为 (rèn wéi, to think, to believe)
认识 (rèn shi, to know, to recognize)
p3-11.definition-english: To hold an opinion or belief; to recognize or acknowledge.
p3-11.sentence: 我认为每个人都应该爱护环境。(I believe everyone should take care of the environment.)

p3-12.definition-english: To design, arrange, or set something up.
p3-12.sentence: 我们正在设计一面新的旗子。(We are designing a new flag.)

p3-12.definition-english: To plan, count, or calculate.
p3-12.sentence: 我计划画一幅漂亮的国旗。(I plan to draw a beautiful national flag.)

p3-12.definition-english: A flag, a piece of cloth with a design representing a country or group.
p3-12.sentence: 国庆节那天,操场上挂满了红旗。(On National Day, the playground is filled with red flags.)

p3-12.english: measure word for small round things
words: 一颗星 (yì kē xīng, one star)
一颗心 (yì kē xīn, one heart)
p3-12.definition-english: A measure word used for small round objects like stars, hearts, or grains.
p3-12.sentence: 夜空中有一颗又大又亮的星星。(There is a big bright star in the night sky.)

words: 去世 (qù shì, to pass away)
p3-12.definition-english: The world; a generation or era.
p3-12.sentence: 世界上有很多不同的国家和民族。(There are many different countries and ethnic groups in the world.)

p3-12.definition-english: A boundary or realm; the world.
p3-12.sentence: 世界上有两百多个国家。(There are more than two hundred countries in the world.)

p3-12.definition-english: An ethnic group or clan of people sharing common ancestry.
p3-12.sentence: 新加坡有华族,马来族和印度族。(Singapore has the Chinese, Malay, and Indian ethnic groups.)

p3-12.definition-english: To print or stamp; also part of the country name India.
p3-12.sentence: 他在纸上盖了一个红色的印。(He stamped a red mark on the paper.)

p3-12.definition-english: A degree or measure; also used in country names like India.
p3-12.sentence: 印度是世界上人口很多的国家。(India is a country with a very large population.)

p3-12.definition-english: To clip, pinch, or hold something between two surfaces.
p3-12.sentence: 妈妈用夹子把衣服夹在绳子上。(Mother used clips to clip the clothes onto the line.)

p3-12.definition-english: Other; among; used to refer to something previously mentioned.
p3-12.sentence: 班上有三十个学生,其中一半是女生。(There are thirty students in the class, half of them are girls.)

words: 竖起 (shù qǐ, to stand upright/raise)
p3-12.definition-english: To stand something upright; vertical.
p3-12.sentence: 他竖起大拇指,夸我做得好。(He gave a thumbs up, praising me for doing well.)

p3-12.definition-english: The thumb, the first and thickest finger.
p3-12.sentence: 他竖起大拇指为我加油。(He gave me a thumbs up to cheer me on.)

p3-12.definition-english: A riddle or mystery that needs to be solved.
p3-12.sentence: 老师给我们出了一个有趣的谜语。(The teacher gave us an interesting riddle.)

p3-12.definition-english: To unite or group together; a round mass or organization.
p3-12.sentence: 国庆节让我们的国家更加团结。(National Day makes our country more united.)

p3-12.definition-english: Excited; to strive energetically.
p3-12.sentence: 国庆节那天,大家都很兴奋。(Everyone is very excited on National Day.)

p3-12.definition-english: Crystal; sparkling and clear.
p3-12.sentence: 晚上的星星像水晶一样闪闪发亮。(The stars at night sparkle like crystals.)

words: 狮子座 (shī zi zuò, Leo constellation)
p3-12.definition-english: A lion, a large wild cat known as the king of animals.
p3-12.sentence: 新加坡的国徽上有一只狮子。(Singapore's national emblem has a lion on it.)

words: 虎年 (hǔ nián, Year of the Tiger)
p3-12.definition-english: A tiger, a large striped wild cat.
p3-12.sentence: 动物园里的老虎又大又凶猛。(The tiger at the zoo is big and fierce.)

words: 华人 (huá rén, ethnic Chinese person)
p3-12.definition-english: Relating to China or the Chinese people; splendid.
p3-12.sentence: 很多华人庆祝中华文化的节日。(Many Chinese people celebrate festivals of Chinese culture.)

p3-12.definition-english: To celebrate a happy or important occasion.
p3-12.sentence: 我们一起庆祝国庆节。(We celebrate National Day together.)

p3-12.definition-english: A finger; to point at something.
p3-12.sentence: 他用手指着国旗,骄傲地笑了。(He pointed at the national flag and smiled proudly.)

words: 转弯 (zhuǎn wān, turn a corner)
p3-12.definition-english: Bent or curved; not straight.
p3-12.sentence: 河水弯弯曲曲地流向大海。(The river winds and bends its way to the sea.)

words: 一座山 (yí zuò shān, one mountain)
p3-12.definition-english: A seat; a measure word used for mountains, buildings, or bridges.
p3-12.sentence: 请大家回到自己的座位坐好。(Please everyone return to your own seat and sit down.)

p3-12.definition-english: To sing.
p3-12.sentence: 国庆节那天,我们一起唱歌庆祝。(On National Day, we sing together to celebrate.)

p3-12.definition-english: A song.
p3-12.sentence: 升旗的时候,大家一起唱国歌。(While the flag is being raised, everyone sings the national anthem together.)

words: 张贴 (zhāng tiē, to put up/post)
p3-12.definition-english: To stick, paste, or affix something onto a surface.
p3-12.sentence: 我们把画好的国旗贴在墙上。(We stuck the flag we drew onto the wall.)

words: 饲养 (sì yǎng, to raise animals)
养鱼 (yǎng yú, to raise fish)
p3-13.definition-english: To raise, rear, or take care of animals or plants.
p3-13.sentence: 爷爷在湖边养虾,每天都去看看。(Grandpa raises prawns by the lake and goes to check on them every day.)

p3-13.definition-english: A small aquatic animal with a long body and many legs, often eaten as food.
p3-13.sentence: 他们家养虾,虾长得又大又肥。(Their family raises prawns, and the prawns grow big and plump.)

p3-13.definition-english: A large body of water surrounded by land.
p3-13.sentence: 我们沿着湖边散步,看到很多小鱼。(We walked along the lakeside and saw many little fish.)

p3-13.definition-english: A small wild animal with a pointed nose and bushy tail, often described as cunning.
p3-13.sentence: 森林里住着一只聪明的狐狸。(A clever fox lives in the forest.)

p3-13.english: a fox-like or cat-like wild animal (as in 狐狸)
words: 果子狸 (guǒ zi lí, masked palm civet)
p3-13.definition-english: Used mainly in the word 狐狸 (fox); also refers to civet-like animals.
p3-13.sentence: 狐狸和狸猫都是森林里常见的动物。(Foxes and civet cats are both common animals in the forest.)

words: 大灰狼 (dà huī láng, big bad wolf)
狼狈 (láng bèi, in a difficult situation)
p3-13.definition-english: A wild animal similar to a dog, known for hunting in packs.
p3-13.sentence: 湖边突然出现了一只狼,大家都吓了一跳。(A wolf suddenly appeared by the lake, and everyone was startled.)

p3-13.definition-english: Used mainly in 猩猩, referring to apes such as orangutans and chimpanzees.
p3-13.sentence: 动物园里的猩猩很喜欢爬树。(The orangutan at the zoo loves climbing trees.)

words: 沿岸 (yán àn, along the bank)
沿路 (yán lù, along the way)
p3-13.definition-english: Along, alongside, or following the edge of something.
p3-13.sentence: 我们沿着沙滩走,一路上拍了很多照片。(We walked along the beach, taking many photos along the way.)

p3-13.definition-english: A flat stretch of sand or land beside water, such as a beach.
p3-13.sentence: 小朋友们在沙滩上快乐地奔跑。(The children happily ran on the beach.)

p3-13.english: to seal, close; measure word for letters
words: 封闭 (fēng bì, to seal, close off)
封面 (fēng miàn, cover of a book)
p3-13.definition-english: To seal or close something; also a measure word for letters.
p3-13.sentence: 他把信放进信封,封好后寄了出去。(He put the letter into the envelope, sealed it, and sent it off.)

p3-13.definition-english: Must; necessarily; certainly.
p3-13.sentence: 过桥的时候,我们必须小心。(When crossing the bridge, we must be careful.)

p3-13.definition-english: Must, have to; also refers to whiskers or a beard.
p3-13.sentence: 过山洞前,我们必须先讨论安全问题。(Before entering the cave, we must first discuss safety issues.)

words: 无论 (wú lùn, no matter what)
p3-13.definition-english: To discuss, talk over, or a theory or opinion about something.
p3-13.sentence: 大家坐在桥边讨论去哪里拍照。(Everyone sat by the bridge discussing where to take photos.)

words: 领导 (lǐng dǎo, leader, to lead)
p3-13.definition-english: To lead or guide; also refers to the collar of clothing.
p3-13.sentence: 猩猩带领大家沿着小路走进森林。(The orangutan led everyone along the path into the forest.)

words: 务必 (wù bì, must, be sure to)
p3-13.definition-english: A task, duty, or job; also relates to providing service.
p3-13.sentence: 这次的任务是拍照记录湖边的动物。(This task is to take photos to record the animals by the lake.)

p3-13.definition-english: Although; even though.
p3-13.sentence: 狐狸虽然聪明,但还是被大家发现了。(Although the fox was clever, it was still discovered by everyone.)

words: 仍旧 (réng jiù, still, as before)
仍需 (réng xū, still need to)
p3-13.definition-english: Still; as before; yet.
p3-13.sentence: 天色虽然暗了,狼群仍然没有离开。(Although the sky had darkened, the wolf pack still hadn't left.)

p3-13.definition-english: A forest; also describes something dense, dark, or gloomy.
p3-13.sentence: 森林里有一个山洞,里面住着一只狼。(There is a cave in the forest, inhabited by a wolf.)

p3-13.definition-english: A cave, hole, or hollow space.
p3-13.sentence: 狐狸躲进了山洞,不敢出来。(The fox hid in the cave and didn't dare to come out.)

words: 过桥 (guò qiáo, cross a bridge)
p3-13.definition-english: A structure built over a river, road, or valley for crossing.
p3-13.sentence: 我们走过一座小桥,来到了湖的另一边。(We walked across a small bridge and arrived at the other side of the lake.)

p3-13.definition-english: Sand; fine loose grains of rock found on beaches and deserts.
p3-13.sentence: 我们在沙滩上堆了一座沙子做的城堡。(We built a castle out of sand on the beach.)

p3-13.english: to pat, clap; to take a photo
words: 拍照 (pāi zhào, take a photo)
拍打 (pāi dǎ, to pat, beat)
p3-13.definition-english: To pat, clap, or take a photograph.
p3-13.sentence: 大家在桥上拍照,笑得很开心。(Everyone took photos on the bridge, laughing happily.)

words: 拍照 (pāi zhào, take a photo)
照顾 (zhào gù, to take care of)
p3-13.definition-english: A photograph; to shine light on something; or to take care of someone.
p3-13.sentence: 他把这张照片拍得很漂亮。(He took this photo very beautifully.)

words: 讨教 (tǎo jiào, ask for advice)
p3-13.definition-english: To discuss or talk something over; to ask for or seek something; also to dislike.
p3-13.sentence: 他们讨论了很久,才决定去湖边拍照。(They discussed for a long time before deciding to go take photos by the lake.)

words: 漂流 (piāo liú, to drift, float)
p3-13.definition-english: To float or drift on water; also means pretty or beautiful.
p3-13.sentence: 湖面上漂着几片叶子,风景很漂亮。(A few leaves floated on the lake's surface, and the scenery was very pretty.)

words: 但愿 (dàn yuàn, wish, hope that)
p3-13.definition-english: But; however; used to introduce a contrast.
p3-13.sentence: 狼很凶,但猩猩一点也不怕。(The wolf was fierce, but the orangutan wasn't afraid at all.)

words: 放假 (fàng jià, be on vacation)
p3-14.definition-english: Not real; to pretend; also a holiday or break from school
p3-14.sentence: 他假装生病,想请假不上学。(He pretended to be sick, wanting to take leave from school.)
大象的力气很强,可以搬动大石头。(The elephant's strength is great; it can move big rocks.)

words: 弱小 (ruò xiǎo, weak and small)
p3-14.sentence: 小猫生病了,身体变得很弱。(The kitten got sick and became very weak.)

words: 狼吞虎咽 (láng tūn hǔ yàn, wolf down food)
p3-14.definition-english: To swallow, especially quickly or whole
p3-14.sentence: 熊懒洋洋地把鱼一口吞了下去。(The bear lazily swallowed the fish in one gulp.)
他做事总是慢吞吞的,一点也不着急。(He always does things slowly, not in a hurry at all.)

p3-14.definition-english: Lazy; unwilling to work or move
p3-14.sentence: 那只熊很懒惰,整天只想睡觉。(That bear is very lazy; it only wants to sleep all day.)
这道汤有点咸,我们再加些水吧。(This soup is a bit salty; let's add some water.)

p3-14.definition-english: Bland or light in taste; weak in strength or color
p3-14.sentence: 妈妈煮的粥味道很淡,很适合生病的人吃。(The porridge Mom cooked tastes very bland, suitable for someone who is sick.)

words: 滑倒 (huá dǎo, slip and fall)
p3-14.sentence: 地板很滑,小心不要滑倒。(The floor is very slippery; be careful not to slip and fall.)
灰熊的毛是灰褐色的,力气很大。(The grizzly bear's fur is greyish-brown, and it is very strong.)

words: 散步 (sàn bù, take a walk)
p3-14.definition-english: To scatter or break up; loose and disorderly
p3-14.sentence: 熊把玩具弄得到处都是,房间变得很散乱。(The bear scattered the toys everywhere, and the room became very messy.)

words: 耍赖 (shuǎ lài, act unreasonably, whine)
耍脾气 (shuǎ pí qi, throw a tantrum)
p3-14.definition-english: To play; to fool around; to act unreasonably
p3-14.sentence: 弟弟输了棋就耍赖,不肯认输。(My younger brother acted unreasonably when he lost the chess game and refused to admit defeat.)

words: 笨重 (bèn zhòng, clumsy and heavy)
p3-14.sentence: 熊的身体笨重,跑起来一点也不快。(The bear's body is clumsy and heavy; it doesn't run fast at all.)

words: 滚开 (gǔn kāi, go away, roll away)
p3-14.definition-english: To roll; to turn over and over
p3-14.sentence: 小熊喜欢在草地上打滚。(The little bear likes to roll around on the grass.)

words: 撕咬 (sī yǎo, bite and tear)
p3-14.definition-english: To bite; to clamp down with teeth
p3-14.sentence: 小狗生气的时候会咬人,要小心。(The puppy may bite people when it's angry, so be careful.)

words: 能够 (néng gòu, be able to)
p3-14.definition-english: Enough; sufficient; to be able to
p3-14.sentence: 我吃饱了,不能再吃了,已经够了。(I'm full and can't eat anymore, it's already enough.)
熊吃饱了以后就躺在地上睡觉。(After the bear ate its fill, it lay down on the ground to sleep.)
这块石头非常硬,敲不碎。(This stone is extremely hard; it can't be broken by knocking.)

words: 软绵绵 (ruǎn mián mián, soft and squishy)
p3-14.sentence: 这个枕头摸起来软绵绵的,很舒服。(This pillow feels soft and squishy; it's very comfortable.)

p3-14.definition-english: Bitter in taste; hard, difficult, or full of suffering
p3-14.sentence: 这种药很苦,但是可以治病。(This medicine is very bitter, but it can cure illness.)

words: 多嘴 (duō zuǐ, talk too much, nosy)
p3-14.sentence: 熊张开大嘴,一口把鱼吞了下去。(The bear opened its big mouth and swallowed the fish in one gulp.)

words: 饿肚子 (è dù zi, have an empty stomach)
p3-14.sentence: 我肚子饿了,想吃点东西。(My stomach is hungry, I want to eat something.)

words: 吃饱 (chī bǎo, eat until full)
温饱 (wēn bǎo, adequately fed and clothed)
p3-14.sentence: 我已经吃饱了,不能再吃了。(I'm already full and can't eat anymore.)

p3-14.definition-english: A bear; also used to describe someone clumsy or foolish
p3-14.sentence: 那只笨熊懒洋洋地躺在树荫下睡觉。(That clumsy bear lay lazily under the tree shade, sleeping.)

p3-14.definition-english: Interesting; fun; a feeling of interest
p3-14.sentence: 我觉得观察小熊的生活习惯很有趣。(I find observing the bear's living habits very interesting.)

p3-15.definition-english: To take something secretly without permission, or to do something quietly without being noticed.
p3-15.sentence: 他趁没人的时候,偷偷地拿走了一块饼干。(He secretly took a biscuit when no one was around.)

words: 吓一跳 (xià yī tiào, be startled)
p3-15.definition-english: To frighten or scare someone.
p3-15.sentence: 那只黑猫突然跳出来,吓了他一跳。(The black cat suddenly jumped out and gave him a fright.)

p3-15.definition-english: To run away or escape from danger or trouble.
p3-15.sentence: 小偷看到警察,就马上逃跑了。(The thief ran away as soon as he saw the police.)

p3-15.definition-english: A feeling of physical or emotional pain.
p3-15.sentence: 他不小心摔倒了,膝盖很痛。(He accidentally fell down, and his knee hurt a lot.)

words: 冒险 (mào xiǎn, take a risk)
感冒 (gǎn mào, catch a cold)
p3-15.definition-english: To emerge or rise up suddenly, or to take a risk despite danger.
p3-15.sentence: 他决定冒险爬进那个黑黑的洞里。(He decided to take a risk and climb into the dark hole.)

p3-15.definition-english: To shake or tremble, usually from fear or cold.
p3-15.sentence: 他吓得全身发抖。(He was so scared that his whole body trembled.)

p3-15.definition-english: To have the courage to do something.
p3-15.sentence: 他很勇敢,敢一个人走进黑暗的教室。(He was very brave and dared to walk into the dark classroom alone.)

words: 钻洞 (zuān dòng, drill/bore a hole)
p3-15.definition-english: To bore or drill into something (zuān), or a diamond/drilling tool (zuàn).
p3-15.sentence: 老鼠在墙角钻了一个洞。(The mouse drilled a hole in the corner of the wall.)

words: 怀里 (huái lǐ, in one's arms)
p3-15.definition-english: To cherish or miss someone or something, or one's chest/embrace.
p3-15.sentence: 奶奶把小猫抱在怀里。(Grandma held the kitten in her arms.)

words: 朱先生 (zhū xiān shēng, Mr. Zhu)
p3-15.definition-english: A Chinese surname; also a bright red (vermillion) colour.
p3-15.sentence: 班里有个同学姓朱,大家都叫他小朱。(There's a classmate in the class surnamed Zhu, and everyone calls him Little Zhu.)

words: 简笔画 (jiǎn bǐ huà, simple line drawing)
p3-15.definition-english: Simple, easy, or not complicated.
p3-15.sentence: 这道数学题很简单,他一下子就做完了。(This math question was very simple, and he finished it right away.)

p3-15.definition-english: Relating to comics or cartoons, or to wander freely without a fixed plan.
p3-15.sentence: 他最喜欢在课余时间看漫画。(He loves reading comics in his free time.)

words: 忍不住 (rěn bú zhù, can't help)
p3-15.definition-english: To endure or hold back a feeling or urge.
p3-15.sentence: 他疼得忍不住叫了出来。(He was in so much pain that he couldn't help crying out.)

words: 哈哈 (hā hā, sound of laughter)
哈气 (hā qì, breathe out, pant)
p3-15.definition-english: An exclamation imitating the sound of laughter.
p3-15.sentence: 看到滑稽的漫画,大家都哈哈大笑起来。(Seeing the funny comic, everyone burst into laughter.)

p3-15.english: oh, exclamation of surprise or regret
words: 哎呀 (āi yā, oh no, oops)
哎哟 (āi yō, ouch, oh dear)
哎呀呀 (āi yā ya, oh dear, emphatic)
p3-15.definition-english: An exclamation expressing surprise, regret, or mild pain.
p3-15.sentence: 哎,我忘记带课本了!(Oh no, I forgot to bring my textbook!)

p3-15.definition-english: An exclamatory particle expressing surprise, or used at the end of a sentence for emphasis.
p3-15.sentence: 这幅漫画真有趣呀!(This comic is really funny!)

p3-15.definition-english: A room, especially an indoor space used for a specific purpose.
p3-15.sentence: 上课铃响了,同学们都跑回教室。(The bell rang, and the students all ran back to the classroom.)

words: 上班 (shàng bān, go to work)
p3-15.definition-english: A class or group of students, or one's shift at work.
p3-15.sentence: 我们班的同学都喜欢看漫画书。(The students in our class all like reading comic books.)

p3-15.definition-english: Simple, single, or alone; not complicated.
p3-15.sentence: 他单独一个人留在教室里做作业。(He stayed alone in the classroom to do his homework.)

words: 挖洞 (wā dòng, dig a hole)
挖掘 (wā jué, excavate, dig up)
p3-15.definition-english: To dig or excavate, making a hole in the ground.
p3-15.sentence: 小狗在花园里挖了一个洞。(The puppy dug a hole in the garden.)

words: 无论 (wú lùn, no matter, regardless)
p3-16.definition-english: Not having something; without; none.
p3-16.sentence: 传说里,白蛇的法力无穷,谁都比不过她。(In the legend, the white snake's magical power was boundless, no one could compare.)

words: 始终 (shǐ zhōng, from beginning to end)
终点 (zhōng diǎn, finish line, endpoint)
p3-16.definition-english: The end or final point; at last.
p3-16.sentence: 白娘子和许仙终于在西湖边相遇了。(The white snake and Xu Xian finally met by West Lake.)

p3-16.definition-english: A snake, a long limbless reptile.
p3-16.sentence: 传说中,白蛇修炼千年后变成了美丽的姑娘。(According to legend, the white snake, after cultivating for a thousand years, turned into a beautiful young woman.)

words: 途中 (tú zhōng, on the way)
p3-16.definition-english: A road or route; the course of a journey.
p3-16.sentence: 他们俩在游西湖的途中认识了彼此。(The two of them got to know each other while touring West Lake.)

p3-16.definition-english: Hardworking; diligent; putting in a lot of effort.
p3-16.sentence: 白娘子既勤劳又善良,深受大家喜爱。(The white snake was both hardworking and kind, and was deeply loved by everyone.)

p3-16.english: the two of them, a couple
words: 他们俩 (tā men liǎ, the two of them)
咱俩 (zán liǎ, the two of us)
姐妹俩 (jiě mèi liǎ, the two sisters)
p3-16.definition-english: A colloquial way of saying 'two people', used after a pronoun or noun.
p3-16.sentence: 许仙和白娘子俩一见钟情,很快就相爱了。(Xu Xian and the white snake fell in love at first sight and soon fell for each other.)

p3-16.definition-english: A wheel; to take turns doing something in order.
p3-16.sentence: 他们轮流划船,一起游遍了西湖。(They took turns rowing the boat and toured all around West Lake together.)

p3-16.definition-english: To catch fish using a hook and line.
p3-16.sentence: 老爷爷每天早上都在湖边钓鱼。(Grandpa goes fishing by the lake every morning.)

words: 数一数 (shǔ yi shǔ, to count)
p3-16.definition-english: A number or amount; to count things one by one.
p3-16.sentence: 白蛇传的故事已经流传了数百年。(The story of the Legend of the White Snake has already been passed down for several hundred years.)

words: 冷却 (lěng què, to cool down)
却步 (què bù, to hesitate, hold back)
p3-16.definition-english: A word meaning 'but' or 'however', showing a turn in meaning.
p3-16.sentence: 法海和尚想拆散他们,许仙却始终相信白娘子。(Monk Fahai wanted to separate them, but Xu Xian always trusted the white snake.)

p3-16.english: to miss, to read aloud, to study
words: 想念 (xiǎng niàn, to miss someone)
念书 (niàn shū, to study, read)
念经 (niàn jīng, to chant scriptures)
p3-16.definition-english: To miss someone; to read aloud; to study.
p3-16.sentence: 法海和尚每天都在寺庙里念经。(Monk Fahai chants scriptures in the temple every day.)

p3-16.english: to pass on, to spread, legend
words: 流传 (liú chuán, to spread, circulate)
p3-16.definition-english: To pass something on; to spread; a legend or tale.
p3-16.sentence: 白蛇传的故事流传至今,大家都爱听。(The story of the Legend of the White Snake has been passed down to this day, and everyone loves hearing it.)

words: 感觉 (gǎn jué, to feel, sense)
p3-16.definition-english: To feel or sense something; an emotion.
p3-16.sentence: 白娘子对许仙的感情十分真挚。(The white snake's feelings for Xu Xian were very sincere.)

words: 抬头 (tái tóu, raise one's head)
p3-16.definition-english: To lift or raise something up.
p3-16.sentence: 她慢慢抬起头,看见了许仙温柔的笑容。(She slowly raised her head and saw Xu Xian's gentle smile.)

p3-16.definition-english: A formal word meaning 'at' or 'in', often used to link ideas together.
p3-16.sentence: 白娘子于西湖边等了许仙很久。(The white snake waited for Xu Xian by West Lake for a long time.)

p3-16.definition-english: To dance; a dance performance.
p3-16.sentence: 节日里,村民们在广场上快乐地跳舞。(During the festival, the villagers danced happily in the square.)

words: 泡水 (pào shuǐ, soak in water)
p3-16.definition-english: A bubble; to soak or steep something in liquid.
p3-16.sentence: 洪水泡了金山寺,法海和白娘子展开了一场大战。(The flood soaked Jinshan Temple, and Fahai and the white snake fought a great battle.)

words: 打结 (dǎ jié, tie a knot)
p3-16.definition-english: To tie a knot; an outcome or result.
p3-16.sentence: 许仙和白娘子结婚后,一起开了一家药店。(After Xu Xian and the white snake got married, they opened a medicine shop together.)

words: 圈子 (quān zi, circle, social group)
圈起来 (quān qǐ lái, to circle, mark)
p3-16.definition-english: A round shape like a ring; to mark something with a circle.
p3-16.sentence: 法海把白娘子困在雷峰塔下的法术圈里。(Fahai trapped the white snake in a magic circle beneath Leifeng Pagoda.)

words: 认识 (rèn shi, to know, recognize)
p3-16.definition-english: To recognize or be familiar with someone or something; knowledge.
p3-16.sentence: 小青最先认识了许仙,便把他介绍给白娘子。(Xiaoqing was the first to get to know Xu Xian, so she introduced him to the white snake.)

p3-16.definition-english: To take the place of something; a generation or era.
p3-16.sentence: 古代流传下来的传说,现代人依然很喜欢。(Legends passed down from ancient times are still loved by people today.)

p3-16.definition-english: To take the place of someone or something; to substitute.
p3-16.sentence: 小青愿意替白娘子挡下这场劫难。(Xiaoqing was willing to take this disaster in the white snake's place.)

words: 低头 (dī tóu, lower one's head)
高低 (gāo dī, high and low)
p3-16.definition-english: Low in position or level; to lower something.
p3-16.sentence: 白娘子低着头,静静地等待许仙的原谅。(The white snake lowered her head, quietly waiting for Xu Xian's forgiveness.)

p3-17.definition-english: A person who works the land; relating to farming
p3-17.sentence: 农夫每天在田里辛勤地工作。(The farmer works hard in the fields every day.)

words: 夫妻 (fū qī, husband and wife)
p3-17.definition-english: A man; a husband; a laborer
p3-17.sentence: 妈妈的丈夫是我的爸爸。(Mom's husband is my dad.)

words: 劳累 (láo lèi, tired from work)
p3-17.definition-english: Work; labor; toil
p3-17.sentence: 农夫每天辛勤劳动,从不偷懒。(The farmer labors diligently every day and never slacks off.)

p3-17.definition-english: Relating to fishing
p3-17.sentence: 渔夫每天划船出海打渔。(The fisherman rows his boat out to sea to fish every day.)

p3-17.definition-english: An immortal being or deity with magical powers
p3-17.sentence: 故事里的神仙帮助了善良的渔夫。(The immortal in the story helped the kind fisherman.)

words: 捞鱼 (lāo yú, scoop up fish)
p3-17.definition-english: To scoop or fish something out of water
p3-17.sentence: 渔夫从河里捞起了一条金鱼。(The fisherman scooped a goldfish out of the river.)

p3-17.definition-english: Spirit; essence; energetic and lively
p3-17.sentence: 河里住着一个神奇的水精灵。(A magical water spirit lived in the river.)

p3-17.definition-english: Iron, a hard grey metal
p3-17.sentence: 那根铁棒掉进了河里。(That iron rod fell into the river.)

p3-17.definition-english: Silver; relating to money or banking
p3-17.sentence: 铁棒碰到水后竟然变成了银子。(The iron rod, upon touching the water, actually turned into silver.)

words: 门牌 (mén pái, house number plate)
p3-17.definition-english: A sign, plate, or brand
p3-17.sentence: 店门口挂着一块写着字的牌子。(A sign with writing on it hung at the shop entrance.)

words: 签名 (qiān míng, sign one's name)
p3-17.definition-english: To sign one's name; a label or ticket
p3-17.sentence: 渔夫在纸上签了自己的名字。(The fisherman signed his own name on the paper.)

p3-17.definition-english: Ten thousand; a very large number
p3-17.sentence: 这批银子的数量超过了一万两。(The amount of silver exceeded ten thousand taels.)

words: 成千上万 (chéng qiān shàng wàn, thousands upon thousands)
p3-17.definition-english: Thousand; a large number
p3-17.sentence: 妈妈说,千万不要靠近河边。(Mom said we must never go near the riverbank.)

words: 加减 (jiā jiǎn, addition and subtraction)
p3-17.definition-english: To subtract; to reduce or decrease
p3-17.sentence: 老师教我们做加减法算术题。(The teacher taught us to do addition and subtraction math problems.)

p3-17.definition-english: To calculate; to plan or intend
p3-17.sentence: 渔夫打算把捡到的银子分给大家。(The fisherman planned to share the silver he found with everyone.)

p3-17.definition-english: To check, inspect, or examine
p3-17.sentence: 神仙检查了渔夫是不是诚实的人。(The immortal checked whether the fisherman was an honest person.)

p3-17.definition-english: To check, examine, or investigate
p3-17.sentence: 神仙仔细查看渔夫捞起来的东西。(The immortal carefully examined what the fisherman had scooped up.)

words: 摘果子 (zhāi guǒ zi, pick fruit)
p3-17.definition-english: To pick or take off, such as fruit or glasses
p3-17.sentence: 渔夫弯下腰摘下了河边的野花。(The fisherman bent down and picked wildflowers by the riverbank.)

p3-17.definition-english: To lose; to be missing
p3-17.sentence: 他一不小心,失去了心爱的鱼竿。(He carelessly lost his beloved fishing rod.)

p3-17.definition-english: Gold; golden in color
p3-17.sentence: 渔夫捞到了一条美丽的金鱼。(The fisherman caught a beautiful goldfish.)

p3-17.definition-english: To try or attempt; a test
p3-17.sentence: 渔夫决定试一试,把铁棒放进水里。(The fisherman decided to give it a try and put the iron rod into the water.)

p3-17.definition-english: To disappear or vanish
p3-17.sentence: 神仙说完话就突然消失了。(The immortal vanished suddenly after finishing speaking.)

words: 等等 (děng děng, etc./wait a moment)
p3-17.definition-english: To wait; to await
p3-17.sentence: 渔夫每天在河边耐心地等待。(The fisherman waited patiently by the riverbank every day.)

p3-17.definition-english: A case (legal); a plan; a pattern
p3-17.sentence: 法官正在调查一起奇怪的案件。(The judge was investigating a strange court case.)

p3-17.definition-english: A moment; to carve; diligent
p3-17.sentence: 渔夫刻苦劳动,从不休息片刻。(The fisherman worked diligently and never rested for even a moment.)

p3-17.definition-english: To feel; to be moved or touched
p3-17.sentence: 渔夫的诚实感动了神仙。(The fisherman's honesty touched the immortal.)
